brief: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami on UK sex crime charges; JD Vance's Epstein-Israel remarks stir controversy; two US troops killed in Jordan; Australia introduces unmasking law. Research examines L2 writing identities, ChatGPT's impact on personal statements, and multimodal LLM benchmarks.
news_summary: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami on UK rape and trafficking charges; Vice President Vance's comments linking Epstein to Israeli intelligence echo conspiracy theories; two US troops killed in Iranian attack in Jordan; Australia announces new unmasking law for social media vilification.
papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors shaping L2 writing instructors' identities, effects of ChatGPT revision on rhetorical moves in personal statements, and benchmarking multimodal large language models for scientific visualization literacy.

en.brief: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami on UK sex crime charges; JD Vance's Epstein-Israel remarks stir controversy; two US troops killed in Jordan; Australia introduces unmasking law. Research examines L2 writing identities, ChatGPT's impact on personal statements, and multimodal LLM benchmarks.
en.news_summary: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami on UK rape and trafficking charges; Vice President Vance's comments linking Epstein to Israeli intelligence echo conspiracy theories; two US troops killed in Iranian attack in Jordan; Australia announces new unmasking law for social media vilification.
en.papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors shaping L2 writing instructors' identities, effects of ChatGPT revision on rhetorical moves in personal statements, and benchmarking multimodal large language models for scientific visualization literacy.

zh.brief: 今日重點：世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙，梅西與姆巴佩爭奪金靴；天文學家首次在宜居帶類地行星發現大氣層；經期追蹤App隱私漏洞受關注。無新中文研究論文。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽看點包括梅西與姆巴佩的金靴之爭及創紀錄獎金；科學家發現一顆位於宜居帶的類地行星擁有大氣層；經期追蹤App收集的數據可能洩露用戶隱私。

todays_image.caption: Both the handcuffing of Henry Louis Gates Jr. and Victoria's new unmasking law target moments when identity and visibility become flashpoints for accountability in systems of power.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Handcuffs used in the arrest of Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
